metadata.title: Who was Albert Einstein?
metadata.color_semantics: INK #3D3929 all text; SPARK #D97757 the one accent — terracotta on quantum moments; SLATE #8A8678 for classical/muted elements
metadata.greeting_note: German hello — Einstein was born in Ulm, Germany. Arc: second in quantum-founders arc after 'Who was Max Planck?'
metadata.note: COLD OPEN LAW: B00 = ClaudeComposerAsk. IN-FOR-BEAR LAW: B00 narration opens 'This is Liam, in for Bear.' ILLUSTRATE LAW: UI only at B00, B03, B06, B08, B09. ASK→RESULT LAW: B03=ask micro-beat, B04=Manim result. HANDOFF LAW: B08='Your turn.' OUTRO LAW: B09=ClaudeTitleOutro restates title with ?. Spine: B00 cold open · B01 the problem · B02 the gambit (Manim E=hf) · B03 ask · B04 result (Manim E=mc²) · B05 reluctant founder · B06 legacy · B07 the man · B08 handoff · B09 outro.
metadata.description_blurb: Albert Einstein didn't just extend Planck's quantum theory — he took it seriously when nobody else dared. In 1905, alone in a Bern patent office, he sent five papers that rewrote physics. Light is a particle. Mass is frozen energy. Space and time bend. The man who built the door couldn't accept where it led.

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file
